Data & Analytics AI Tools

20 Data & Analytics tools reviewed and rated. Click any tool for details, or use the AI Advisor to find the best fit for your goal.

ChatComparison.ai
Freemium · Medium reliability
Compare answers from multiple AI chatbots side by side in one place.
FlowChartAI
Freemium · Medium reliability
Converts images and text into flowcharts and editable spreadsheets.
Salesforce Einstein
Paid · High reliability
AI layer across Salesforce for CRM insights, predictions, and automation.
Microsoft Fabric
Paid · High reliability
Unified analytics platform with Copilot for querying and visualizing enterprise data.
ThoughtSpot
Freemium · Medium reliability
Natural language analytics that lets anyone query business data by typing.
Tableau AI
Paid · High reliability
Generative AI features for auto-generating dashboards and data narratives.
Gong
Paid · High reliability
Market leader in conversation intelligence — analyses sales calls to surface winning patterns and coaching insights.
Rendair AI
Freemium · Medium reliability
Essential for real estate brokers — provides renovation visualisation to help buyers envision property potential.
Obviously AI
Freemium · High reliability
No-code platform for running predictive models on structured business data without data science expertise.
Origin
Freemium · Medium reliability
Provides a holistic consumer-level view of a user's financial life, goals, and planning needs.
Shortcut
Paid · High reliability
Premier AI tool for investment banking analysts to build integrated Excel financial models faster.
Med-Gemini
Custom · High reliability
Clinically-native AI trained on medical text and images to assist with diagnostics and disease progression.
Power BI Copilot
Paid · High reliability
Microsoft's AI assistant inside Power BI for generating reports, summaries, and DAX queries from natural language.
Akkio
Freemium · High reliability
No-code AI platform for predictive analytics, lead scoring, and forecasting from your business data.
MonkeyLearn
Paid · Medium reliability
No-code text analytics for sentiment, topic, and intent classification on customer feedback at scale.
Elicit
Freemium · High reliability
AI research assistant that finds, summarises, and extracts data from academic papers in seconds.
Julius AI
Freemium · High reliability
Conversational data analyst that builds charts, runs analyses, and answers questions about your spreadsheets.
Browse AI
Freemium · High reliability
No-code web scraping and monitoring — train a bot to extract structured data from any site.
Glean
Paid · High reliability
Enterprise AI search across all your work apps — Slack, Drive, Notion, GitHub — with personalised answers.
Consensus
Freemium · High reliability
AI-powered scientific research engine that surfaces evidence-backed answers from peer-reviewed studies.
